## Source: ghsa-malware (4ae62dc64a37956f3444013e4dd1287b53c4f98d5811644e41de70bea7820b31)
## Source: ossf-package-analysis (5ef3fd9f7c979ad17316b55bd4b33311a8afc4966f82955133c709fef2b53e84)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'icare' @ 1.0.0 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (5ef3fd9f7c979ad17316b55bd4b33311a8afc4966f82955133c709fef2b53e84)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'icare' @ 1.0.0 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
